entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A heat and drought tolerant cereal crop providing a vital food source in the sub-Saharan Sahel region.

entities.name: PRIMARY ROOT GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the single fast-growing primary root in pearl millet seedlings, associated with early water stress tolerance.

entities.name: EARLY DROUGHT STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to withstand water stress during early growth stages.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN SAHEL
entities.description: The region where pearl millet was domesticated and is a vital food source.

entities.name: CROP MODELING
entities.description: A technique used to demonstrate that early drought stress is an important constraint in Sahelian agrosystems.

entities.name: EARLY DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: An environmental constraint affecting agrosystems in the Sahel region.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A genetic approach used to identify genomic regions controlling root traits.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: A genetic approach used to identify genomic regions controlling root traits.

entities.name: PGGRXC9
entities.description: A glutaredoxin-encoding gene identified as a candidate regulator for stress resilience and root growth.

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: A model plant used to functionally characterize the homolog of PgGRXC9.

entities.name: ATROXY19
entities.description: The closest Arabidopsis homolog of the PgGRXC9 gene.

entities.name: CELL ELONGATION
entities.description: A cellular process regulated by the glutaredoxin gene clade to enhance root growth.

entities.name: GLUTAREDXIN
entities.description: A clade of genes (GRX) that regulate cell elongation and confer resilience to environmental stress.

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: An environmental stressor that pearl millet is tolerant to.
